reasoning: The Polymarket prediction market odds were at 1% in mid-October 2025. Historically, blockbusters and mid-franchise sci-fi sequels struggle to win Best Picture. While Avatar and Avatar: The Way of Water were both nominated, neither won Best Picture, taking home technical awards instead. Recent Oscar prediction forums and articles from Gold Derby and IndieWire place Avatar: Fire and Ash firmly in the 'potential nominee / visual effects winner' tier rather than the 'Best Picture winner' tier. There is basically no serious buzz for it winning the top prize. Because of the rules dictating probabilities must be between 0.05 and 0.95, I am setting this at the minimum bound of 0.05.
